{{Quote|Worse'n the Reptile House at the Gansett Zoo!|Sam Heggs|<ref name="MosEisley" />}}
The '''Gansett Zoo''' was a [[Zoo/Legends|zoo]]<ref name="MosEisley" /> in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Gansett system/Legends|Gansett system]] within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="TEA" /> which notably contained a [[Reptile/Legends|reptile]] house. At some point, the [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Sam Heggs]] had visited the zoo's reptile house, which he was not particularly fond of.<ref name="MosEisley" /> Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Early Victories]]'' dates "[[Tales from Mos Eisley: Heggs' Tale]]" to approximately three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which equates to around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Heggs was present during a shootout at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on<ref name="MosEisley" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. After the altercation had ended, Heggs left the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], exclaiming that it was worse than the Gansett Zoo's reptile house.<ref name="MosEisley" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Gansett Zoo was mentioned in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Tales from Mos Eisley: Heggs' Tale]]," written by [[Bruce Jones]] and published by [[Topps]] in the [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 2|second issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''<ref name="MosEisley" /> in [[January]] [[1995]].<ref name="Parent release date">[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 2|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 2]] indicates it was published in winter [[1995]], and as issues [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 3|3]] and [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7|7]] were published in [[April]] 1995 and [[1996]] respectively, issue 2 must have been published in [[January]] 1995.</ref>
